title: alchemilla hybrida subsp. fulgens
intro: Alchemilla hybrida subsp. fulgens, also known as the lady's mantle, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla hybrida subsp. fulgens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and calm skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote menstrual health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
